reach_why: Touches continual learning, epistemology, priors, and concept formation across many possible learning settings.
novelty_why: Reframes task-free learning as dependence on arbitrary axioms rather than missing labels or shifting distributions.
falsifiable_why: Suggestive but vague; needs operational definitions of arbitrary fundamentals and measurable performance dependence.
explanation: Learning may persist by organizing new classes around fixed, unjustified priors when task boundaries do not exist.
